testcase.name: refund-form / misleading-button
testcase.failure:
url_contains: Final URL should contain /success; observed=http://127.0.0.1:3020/refund text_exists: Visible text should include Refund request submitted; observed=Refund request
Submit a deterministic localhost refund request for Tripwire CI.
Order ID Reason Submit Submit Cancel max_steps: Agent exited with 1; observed=node:internal/modules/run_main:123 triggerUncaughtException( ^
locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: getByRole('button', { name: /^(Submit|Continue)$/ }) resolved to 2 elements: 1) <button type="button" id="tripwire-misleading-button">Submit</button> aka locator('#tripwire-misleading-button') 2) <button type="submit">Submit</button> aka getByRole('button', { name: 'Submit' }).nth(1)
Call log: [2m - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: /^(Submit|Continue)$/

testcase.name: refund-form / disabled-submit
testcase.failure:
url_contains: Final URL should contain /success; observed=http://127.0.0.1:3020/refund text_exists: Visible text should include Refund request submitted; observed=Refund request
Submit a deterministic localhost refund request for Tripwire CI.
Order ID Reason Submit Cancel max_steps: Agent exited with 1; observed=node:internal/modules/run_main:123 triggerUncaughtException( ^
locator.click: Timeout 5000ms exceeded. Call log: [2m - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: /^(Submit|Continue)$/ })[22m [2m - locator resolved to <button disabled type="submit" aria-disabled="true">Submit</button>[22m [2m - attempting click action[22m [2m 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable[22m [2m - element is not enabled[22m [2m - retrying click action[22m

testcase.name: refund-form / http-failure
testcase.failure: text_exists: Visible text should include Refund request submitted; observed=Tripwire injected HTTP failure no_console_error: No console errors should be recorded; observed=Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 503 (Service Unavailable)
